en.text: a spot (general in space, but limited by occupancy; whereas is a large but participle locality), i.e. location (as a position, home, tract, etc.); figuratively, condition, opportunity; specially, a scabbard

senses.gloss_en: a spot (general in space, but limited by occupancy; whereas is a large but participle locality), i.e. location (as a position, home, tract, etc.); figuratively, condition, opportunity; specially, a scabbard
